s: Never forget the gender of nouns with Gendie - the grammatical gender trainer
d:
Gendie is an app for learning the grammatical gender of nouns.

The app uses a spaced repetition system (SRS) and suffix identification
lessons (in-app: 'types') to help you always get that correct gender.

Features:

- Learn and review Noun genders of multiple languages:

 1. Polish (Ten,Ta,To)
 2. French (La,Le)
 3. German (Der,Die,Das)
 4. Russian (этот, эта, это)
 5. Hebrew (זה, זאת)
 6. Norwegian Bokmål (Denne, Dette)
 7. Spanish (El, La)

- Noun suffix training lessons (types)
- Spaced repetition scheduling
- Audio pronunciation samples
- Progress statistics and streak tracking
- Customizable reminders
- Wiktionary links for each word
- Import/Export your progress

No ads, no tracking, just pure learning.

Note: High-quality audio recordings are optional and can be downloaded from GitHub within the app; the app remains fully functional without this by using system Text-to-Speech.
